message:
🐛 Skip DCO verification for Copilot bot PRs

Bot-generated PRs don't have DCO sign-off. Skip verification
for copilot-swe-agent similar to dependabot exemption.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,5 +10,9 @@ permissions:
 
 jobs:
   verify:
+    # Skip verification for bot PRs (Copilot, dependabot, etc.)
+    if: |
+      !contains(github.event.pull_request.user.login, 'copilot-swe-agent') &&
+      !contains(github.event.pull_request.user.login, 'dependabot')
     uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-pr-verifier.yml@main
     secrets: inherit
